title: Avanibhajana Pallaveshwaram temple
tagline: Avanibhajana Pallaveshwaram temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Avanibhajana Pallaveshwaram temple also called Stambeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, located in the town of Seeyamangalam, Tiruvannamalai district in Tamil Nadu
overview.description: Avanibhajana Pallaveshwaram temple also called Stambeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, located in the town of Seeyamangalam, Tiruvannamalai district in Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is constructed in Rock-cut architecture by the Pallava king Mahendravarman I (600-630 CE) during the 7th century. The cave temple had later additions from the Chola and Vijayanagar Empire. One of the pillars has a sculpture of Nataraja, believed to be the earliest representation of the deity in South India.

topPlaces.name: Desur
topPlaces.description: Desur is a Town panchayat in Tiruvanamalai district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Vedal, Tiruvannamalai
topPlaces.description: Vedal is a village in the Vandavasi taluk of Tiruvannamalai district of Tamil Nadu, India. In 2011, it had a population of 2,092.

topPlaces.name: Kallapuliyur
topPlaces.description: Kallapuliyur is a village in the Gingee taluk of Villupuram district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Malaiyur
topPlaces.description: Mazhaiyur, also spelt Mazhaiyur, is a small town in Tiruvannamalai district of Tamil Nadu, India. Mazhaiyur is 110 km (68 mi) south-west of Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Melmalayanur
topPlaces.description: Melmalayanur is a developing town in Villupuram district Tamil Nadu, India, 10 km from Avalurpet and 21km away from Gingee (Villupuram District) It is famous for the Goddess Angala Amman temple . Devotees across South India visit this temple to avail blessings of lord Angala Amman .

topPlaces.name: Kil Sevalambady
topPlaces.description: Kil Sevalambady is a village located in Viluppuram District Melmalaiyanur Taluk, Peruvalur Post, State Tamil Nadu, India. Placed in rural part of Viluppuram district in Tamil Nadu, it is one of the 79 villages in Melmalayanur Panchayat Union, Vadavetti Panchayat in Viluppuram district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Avanibhajana Pallaveshwaram temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Avanibhajana Pallaveshwaram temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Avanibhajana Pallaveshwaram temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (99 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (114 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Avanibhajana Pallaveshwaram temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Avanibhajana Pallaveshwaram temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Avanibhajana Pallaveshwaram temple?
faq.a: Stays in Avanibhajana Pallaveshwaram temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Avanibhajana Pallaveshwaram temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Desur, Vedal, Tiruvannamalai, Kallapuliyur, Malaiyur, Melmalayanur.
